1dd5b.summary: status misses packages installed outside the uv-run interpreter
1dd5b.content: self status can report cached packages as not installed when the package was installed into a different Python environment than the interpreter used by `uv run`. Live checks showed bare `python -m pip show zush-jobqueue` resolving to the Scoop Python site-packages directory, while `uv run python` only saw `gh-for-zush` and `zush`. The current status path uses importlib.metadata from the active `uv run` interpreter, so external installs are invisible unless they are exposed through the same runtime environment.
